title: Craftian Forms (Cobblemon)
description: Minecraft themed regional variants for Cobblemon!
body:
Craftian Forms are Minecraft themed regional Pokémon forms for the Cobblemon mod. In the current release, there are 5 new Pokémon to find: **Craftian Wooper** *Water/Ice Type*
Can be found in snowy biomes, near ice blocks. **Glacire** *Water/Ice Type*
Evolves from Craftian Wooper at level 20, or found in the same places as Craftian Wooper. **Craftian Sableye** *Dark/Psychic Type*
Can be found uncommonly in the Deep Dark. **Craftian Magnemite** and **Craftian Magneton** *Psychic Type*
Intended to spawn in The End, but I could not find them in testing. The final stage of the evolution line will be coming in a later version. Additionally, due to a quirk with Cobblemon's multiple forms system, they are currently dual type *Psychic/Psychic*.
